chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.344 of 2023 Dr. Amjad Ali & others Versus Bahria Town Private Ltd. & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 4206/23 2. For orders on office objection a/w reply as at “A” 3. For orders on CMA 4207/23 4. For hearing of main case 5. For orders on CMA 4208/23 6. For orders on CMA 4209/23 Dated: 19.10.2023 Mr. Muhammad Osama Asif for appellants. -.-.- Against the impugned order whereby an application under order XII Rule 6 CPC was dismissed, this appeal has been filed by alleged allottee of some of the land/plot in Bahria Town/respondents. The appellant has relied upon a document as an admission, on the part of the defendants/respondents, which was neither appended with the written statement nor was ever filed in the Court after initiation of proceedings. Order XII Rule 6 CPC relates to a “stage” of a suit i.e. after it is filed. Nothing in the shape of such admission is/was available for passing a decree within the frame of Order XII Rule 6 CPC. Appeal as such is misconceived and is accordingly dismissed along with listed applications. Judge Judge
